title: Branch isolation for worker operations
definition_of_done: Worker commands (claim, note, heartbeat, transition) read/write exclusively to issues branch in multi-branch mode. No cross-contamination of working branch history.
outcome: Branch isolation for worker operations complete. All worker op writes (claim, note, heartbeat, transition, create, link, decision, reopen, merged) route through appendOp/AppendAndCommit. In dual-branch mode, each op is committed to the _trellis branch worktree. Fixed remaining ops.AppendOp call in claim.go scope-overlap path. All tests pass.
